aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.content: Curiosity and a constant drive to improve shape how I approach both challenges and everyday life. Whether working through complex situations or exploring new ideas, I tend to stay patient, focused, and solution-oriented. Video games have played a big role in developing my ability to think strategically, adapt quickly, and communicate effectively in team-based environments, especially when facing unexpected obstacles. Swimming, on the other hand, helps me stay disciplined and consistent while giving me space to reset and maintain balance. I value steady growth, meaningful connections, and approaching each challenge with a clear mind and a collaborative mindset.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
highlights: Developed features for a Facility Management System (FMS) supporting 120+ engineering projects across 3 countries and 30+ enterprise clients
Designed offline-first functionality enabling engineering teams to operate in low-connectivity environments, supporting ~70% of teams.
Implemented digital signature workflows, generating estimated savings of $120K+ monthly ($1,000+ per project across 120+ projects) by accelerating approvals and reducing paper-based processes
Led adoption of internal IT tools across a 35-person team, improving ~15 Jira workflows through templates and better documentation, requiring strong communication and change management across teams
Automated deployment processes in collaboration with the infrastructure team, reducing release turnaround time from 4 hours to 5 minutes.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
highlights: Integrated the sales pipeline with HubSpot, Zapier, DocuSign, and SendGrid, automating qualification and follow-up for ~25 businesses daily (750+ monthly)
Built web scraping and SEO analysis automation to evaluate ~25 buying-intent businesses per day, feeding qualified prospects directly into the sales pipeline
Applied analytical thinking to process and analyze large-scale business data in BigQuery, identifying and prioritizing potential clients
Built CI/CD pipelines and supported testing across unit, integration, and end-to-end levels.

experience.title: Full Stack Freelance Developer
highlights: Delivered full stack solutions across 4 freelance client projects in retail, real estate, logistics, and SaaS environments
Del Perrero: Built a POS system used for daily sales and inventory tracking, improving operational efficiency for a retail business
Javier Propiedades: Built a property listings site with partner-site scraping to expand inventory and visibility
EFY: Contributed to microservices for an on-demand beauty services app with real-time location, payments, and notifications
Ferbienes: Built NestJS microservices and APIs supporting thousands of daily warehouse operations in a WMS app
